text:
Mary Moraa celebrates winning the 800m race during the Kip Keino Classic Continental Tour Nairobi 2023 meet at Kasarani Stadium on May 13, 2023.[Stafford Ondego, Standard]

title: Paris Olympics 2024: World champion Moraa promises to stretch her ambitions in France
author: Ochieng Oyugi
description: Her greatest rival, Olympic 800m champion Athing Mu will miss the competition.
